part.name: Production enclosure bracket (L3)
part.description: Production-ready FDM bracket with controlled fit on mating rails and cosmetic front surface.
interfaces: Rail interface: sliding fit to mating channel
4x M3 insert locations for enclosure assembly
critical_features: Rail width and straightness for slide fit

manufacturing.process_notes: Print flat on datum side, supports from build plate only.

tolerances.general: Sliding rail fit target: 0.20 mm clearance per side after support cleanup.
critical: Insert center distance +/-0.15 mm to datum edge

requirements: Check rail fit gauge each lot
Sample 5 parts per batch for insert spacing
